content: dw, i noticed and i am reverting this change

i am going to have our live ops people help me invite a ticket bot into this server, so you guys can open a ticket for any of our official staff. it will then collect your feedback and compile them into a query sheet. so your questions don't get buried

in the future, you guys can send us "card desc improvement suggestions" as queries instead of having to edit them yourselves!
our loc people will read suggestion queries weekly and see how we can correctly implement them. so issues like this could be avoided

we strive to eventually answer and resolve every feedback you give us, both in this server and in the main server;
we can't do that yet but maybe a ticket bot would help. atp we have to manually check discord and a lot of messages and pings get buried
I am currently teaching myself unity UX stuff so I can fix weird line breaks like this!
right is the new look. now we just need to find a way so it does this automatically, in every language. to prevent linebreaks in awkward positions
both. i mean in both servers lol
